sandbox — bash — 80×24
# 8Cloud Sandbox · Ubuntu 22.04
kubectl get pods -A
NAMESPACE NAME READY
default web-app-7d9f 1/1
default api-srv-2x8k 1/1
 
docker ps --format "{{.Names}}"
NAMES
nginx-proxy
postgres-db
 
terraform plan -out=tfplan
Plan: 3 to add, 0 to change
$
